chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 11 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.2669/2025 (C/A) 30-10-2025 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for Alleged Contemnor Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General >>>>>>>>>..<<<<<<<< Learned counsel for alleged contemnor files a statement along with certain documents, which is taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the Petitioner. Compliance of order dated 16-10-2025 has now been made, which is affirmed by Counsel for the Petitioner. In view of such position, the listed contempt application is disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
